texto: When daylight is here i dream of the night,The stars of a country sky that shine so bright.A night sky without clouds, for the moon to hide under,Revealing every twinkle and every beam, of the Milky Way's wonder.I grow sad in the morning, And i pay the day no mind.Every time i see the light coming, I know the sunset's not far behind.
explicacao: Citação de J.M. Pierce sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When daylight is here i dream of the night,The stars of a country sky that shine so bright.A nigh…” articula motivacao, night, poem em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e boa-noite.
